description: CompositionGreen brief made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has a wide comfortable elasticated waistband with a printed brand tab, stitch detailing, white tape detailing at the legs and on the front and printed label on the inside of the waistbandProcured from authorized channel partner of Sri SR Mill, Tanuku (AP) & ndash the India licensee for Playboy Men& rsquo s Underwear Wash care Machine wash cold at 40 degrees with like colours Use only non chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry low Cool iron Once you experience the superior comfort and cheeky style of playboy inner wear, there's no going back. Crafted from soft cotton/lycra blend with soft elastic, perfect for your comfort, Playboy has kept your convenience in mind while designing this pair of briefs.
